full_text:
Liu Zhang (Jiyu) 劉璋 (季玉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zhang (劉璋), styledJiyu (季玉), was born in Jingling county, Jiangxia commandery. Son of Liu Yan. Governed Yi province before Liu Bei usurped his title by force. Liu Zhang was affiliated with Dong Zhuo, Liu Yan, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wu Kingdom. Liu Zhang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
